label: About
title: About Scanned Bouquet Instrument Field
short_blurb: A daily generated front page where the image is the interface.
body: Daily Frontpage is a daily generated interactive front page. Each edition starts from recent saved signals and source research, becomes a new image-led scene, and stays explorable in the archive. The image is the interface: visible marks, objects, and surfaces in the scene open the real sources that shaped the day.

This iteration began with 42 recent saved-signal files and 72 captured links, then narrowed the page to 9 source windows around digibouquet and @jonaasw1: cool internet things pt. 6 - math visualized - visual instruments, plus 7 more. A source image from assets.pauwee.com helped set the palette, contrast, edge behavior, and gesture. The scene became Scanned Bouquet Instrument Field: Overhead scan of a textile field: a mostly uninterrupted cream-to-sage paper surface, flat and specimen-like, with source-bearing marks placed as repairs rather than panels. After the image was made, a plate-reading pass mapped 9 visible regions and the mask audit tightened them against pressed translucent flower repair at lower center-left, blue filament orbit knot at right-center, and bottom hairline waveform seam.

typography.rationale: Bricolage Grotesque and Space Grotesk fit record, arcade, and listening-room editions while Fraunces keeps source captions tactile.
